deck.title: Native objects survive the handoff
deck.audience: Presentation-producing agents and maintainers evaluating PPTX editability
deck.outcome: Require evidence before calling a generated PowerPoint editable
deck.main_promise: A native PPTX is a package of editable objects plus proof, not merely a file extension
deck.narrative_spine: Claim -> contract -> proof -> evidence -> gate -> handoff
assumptions: The benchmark is about the PPTX production mechanism, not external market facts
No decorative images are needed because native-object proof is the main visual

slides.key_message: This deck proves that text, shapes, data, and notes remain editable after export.
slides.visual: Minimal split cover with native-object proof statement
slides.speaker_note: Frame editability as a testable delivery contract, not a marketing adjective.

slides.key_message: A valid native handoff proves object structure, rendered fidelity, clean copy, and documented exceptions.
slides.visual: Large four-times proof marker with a numbered contract
slides.speaker_note: Explain that any one missing proof leaves an editability claim incomplete.

slides.action_title: Native charts keep the underlying data changeable
slides.key_message: The chart is a PowerPoint chart object with editable categories and series values.
evidence: Illustrative fixture values created for this benchmark
slides.speaker_note: Open the chart data in PowerPoint and change any value to verify the promise.

slides.action_title: Native tables make the handoff auditable
slides.key_message: Each promise is paired with a concrete artifact and a pass signal.
slides.speaker_note: Use the matrix as the release checklist for future native cases.

slides.action_title: The release gate catches flattened impostors
slides.key_message: Build, reopen, render, inspect, and only then accept the native lane.
slides.speaker_note: Stress that reopening the exported file tests the deliverable rather than the in-memory draft.

steps.title: Plan
steps.detail: Validate the story and native payload.

slides.action_title: Every editable promise now leaves evidence
slides.key_message: The deck, previews, inspection log, editability report, and QA record travel together.
slides.visual: Dark closing statement with proof accent
slides.speaker_note: Close by making the evidence package the reusable definition of done.
